name: aar-engineering
description: The SWE pipeline for building the AAR product (the engineering layer, not a shipped research plugin). ship-change: gated PR → cross-family code review (verify-claims --code) → auto-merge when clean. Takes an EXPLICIT changed-path list (never 'the working tree'), runs the repo's tracked .aar-ci check profile + fake-HOME behavior smoke, and auto-merges only on a clean review. Pairs with verify-claims (the review primitives) and a per-repo .aar-ci/ profile.
